mapper.sql: id::text AS id, type, name, summary, description, main_image_id::text AS "mainImageId", image_ids::text[] AS "imageIds", amenities, check_in_time AS "checkInTime", check_out_time AS "checkOutTime", featured_yn AS "featuredYn", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", created_by::text AS "createdBy", updated_at AS "updatedAt", updated_by::text AS "updatedBy"
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::text AS count FROM accommodation WHERE active_yn = 'Y'
SELECT name FROM accommodation WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM accommodation WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accommodation ( type, name, summary, description, main_image_id, image_ids, amenities, check_in_time, check_out_time, featured_yn, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{type}, #{name}, #{summary}, #{description}, ${mainImageId}, ${imageIds}, ${amenities}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{featuredYn}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy} ) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE accommodation
type = #{type}, name = #{name}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, main_image_id = ${mainImageId}, image_ids = ${imageIds}, amenities = ${amenities}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, featured_yn = #{featuredYn}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = ${updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
mapper.sql: id::text AS id, accommodation_id::text AS "accommodationId", name, description, base_guests AS "baseGuests", max_guests AS "maxGuests", weekday_price AS "weekdayPrice", weekend_price AS "weekendPrice", main_image_id::text AS "mainImageId", image_ids::text[] AS "imageIds", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM room WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room ( accommodation_id, name, description, base_guests, max_guests, weekday_price, weekend_price, main_image_id, image_ids, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( ${accommodationId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{baseGuests}, #{maxGuests}, #{weekdayPrice}, #{weekendPrice}, ${mainImageId}, ${imageIds}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy} ) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE room
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, base_guests = #{baseGuests}, max_guests = #{maxGuests}, weekday_price = #{weekdayPrice}, weekend_price = #{weekendPrice}, main_image_id = ${mainImageId}, image_ids = ${imageIds}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
mapper.sql: id::text AS id, name, start_date AS "startDate", end_date AS "endDate", room_id::text AS "roomId", price, active_yn AS "activeYn", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO season_rate (name, start_date, end_date, room_id, price, active_yn, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{startDate}::date, #{endDate}::date, ${roomId}, #{price}, #{activeYn}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE season_rate
name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}::date, end_date = #{endDate}::date, room_id = ${roomId}, price = #{price}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
